'''鈭歷-zh-th-l''' ('''kavazhtheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electroeluate|electroeluate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electroeluate|electroeluate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-zh-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| kavazhtheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
